name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Diego Rivera
description:
!MLA!

God, you’re the most beautiful person Diego has ever seen…

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

This is a late birthday gift for @jkkah‼️ HAPPY BIRTHDAY MAN!! You’re such a cool content creator and I’m so glad we’re pals :)). I hope you enjoy Diego and I also hope he lives up to your expectations😈😈. Sorry I didn’t make a scenario for you to cry sad tears to… but maybe happy tears?

‼️User here is NOT the same user as my other Wipeout bots‼️ They are implied not to be in the band, but you can easily change that if you really want to. The main reason I decided to have this user be different is because I always imagined Diego already having a partner who he is intensely loyal to. Also other user has more than enough drama going for them already 😭😭.

OMG GUYS I MADE A WIPEOUT BOT WITHOUT ANGST 🤯🤯. Who knew that was even possible?? There’s a smut tag btw because like… the scenario is set up so you can be all sweet and disgusting or you can get freaky. I know Diego won’t protest either way 😏. Also Natt will be coming out‼️ eventually…

Art does NOT belong to me: Art is by @hunnismoker on Insta‼️ thank you so much @ryangoslingssidewife <33
creator: Alladeeznuts
